final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing abstract fine art painting suitable for display in a modern art gallery (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "抽象表现主义" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Abstract Expressionism (1950s New York School, de Kooning / Kline gestural tradition), 朱德群 (Chinese-French lyrical abstraction), 1980s Neo-Expressionist canvas energy; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a dynamic, non-representational composition — exact framing and balance is yours
Subject: must include bold color collisions and fluid gestural brushwork with no figurative imagery — pure emotion and energy as subject
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a charged, emotionally intense atmosphere — exact mood temperature is yours
Color palette: needs a bold, high-contrast direction with clashing colors — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a painterly surface treatment with visible brushstroke movement — exact impasto weight and texture is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must contain no figurative or representational imagery
Avoid: must avoid any recognizable figures, objects, or symbols; must avoid flat or decorative illustration style
